# Discord Chat Analysis for 💻│developers

## 1. Summary
The chat segment contains a technical issue reported by user Valiant regarding the `.tag` functionality in what appears to be the Hyperfy platform. Valiant described attempting to use the tag feature for raycasting as documented in the Hyperfy GitHub repository, but consistently receiving `null` values despite trying multiple implementation approaches. The user detailed various test scenarios including setting tags in constructor options, as properties before and after `app.add()`, and with both same and separate apps for raycasting. The remainder of the chat involved users identifying a potential scam message and requesting moderation action, which is unrelated to the technical discussion.

## 2. FAQ
Q: How can I get the .tag property working with raycasting? (asked by Valiant) A: Unanswered

## 3. Help Interactions
None identified in this chat segment.

## 4. Action Items
Technical: Investigate why the .tag property returns null in raycasting despite documentation | Mentioned By: Valiant
Documentation: Review accuracy of tag functionality documentation in Prim.md | Mentioned By: Valiant
